title: Replace nil comparison with is_nil/1
prompt: Write a query function `MyApp.Accounts.unverified_users/0` that returns all users whose `email_verified_at` is NULL. Do NOT use `u.email_verified_at == nil` — Ecto forbids nil comparisons. Use the `is_nil/1` function instead. Write the module to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single-step transformation; `is_nil/1` rule is well-documented and Ecto raises a helpful error when violated.
research_citation: Ecto.Query hexdocs: 'nil comparison in filters is forbidden and it will raise an error; use is_nil/1 instead'
